description: Form cohorts based on time periods (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)

basic_usage.description: Create monthly cohorts from signup dates
basic_usage.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_time_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D'),
    'activity_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form monthly cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    time_period='M',
    format_cohorts=True,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d'
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'signup_date', 'signup_month']].head())

weekly_cohorts.description: Create weekly cohorts for detailed analysis
weekly_cohorts.code:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_week',
    time_period='W',
    format_cohorts=True
)
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'signup_date', 'signup_week']].head())

quarterly_cohorts.description: Create quarterly cohorts for long-term analysis
quarterly_cohorts.code:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_quarter',
    time_period='Q',
    format_cohorts=True
)
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'signup_date', 'signup_quarter']].head())

parameters.date_column: Column containing dates for cohort formation
parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.format_cohorts: Whether to format cohorts as readable strings (default: True)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime

description: Form cohorts based on user behavior patterns and characteristics

subscription_plan_cohorts.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_behavioral_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data with subscription plans
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'subscription_plan': ['free', 'basic', 'premium', 'enterprise'] * 25,
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form behavioral cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='subscription_plan',
    cohort_column='plan_cohort',
    custom_cohorts={
        'Premium': ['premium', 'enterprise'],
        'Basic': ['basic'],
        'Free': ['free']
    }
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'subscription_plan', 'plan_cohort']].head())

age_based_cohorts.code:
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'age': [20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 45, 50, 55, 60, 65] * 10,
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='age',
    cohort_column='age_group',
    conditions={
        '18-24': ('between', 18, 24),
        '25-34': ('between', 25, 34),
        '35-44': ('between', 35, 44),
        '45-54': ('between', 45, 54),
        '55+': ('>', 54)
    }
)
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'age', 'age_group']].head())

parameters.behavior_column: Column containing behavior data for cohort formation
parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.conditions: Dictionary mapping cohort names to conditions
parameters.custom_cohorts: Dictionary mapping cohort names to custom functions

description: Form cohorts based on acquisition time and source

acquisition_source_cohorts.description: Create cohorts combining acquisition source and time period
acquisition_source_cohorts.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_acquisition_cohorts

# Step 1: Create sample data with acquisition sources
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 101),
    'acquisition_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D'),
    'acquisition_source': ['organic', 'paid', 'referral', 'social'] * 25,
    'activity_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=100, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)

# Step 3: Form acquisition cohorts
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_acquisition_cohorts(
    acquisition_date_column='acquisition_date',
    acquisition_source_column='acquisition_source',
    cohort_column='acquisition_cohort',
    time_period='M',
    combine_source=True,
    format_cohorts=True
)

# Step 4: View results
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'acquisition_date', 'acquisition_source', 'acquisition_cohort']].head())

time_only_cohorts.description: Create time-based cohorts without combining with source
time_only_cohorts.code:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_acquisition_cohorts(
    acquisition_date_column='acquisition_date',
    acquisition_source_column='acquisition_source',
    cohort_column='acquisition_month',
    time_period='M',
    combine_source=False,
    format_cohorts=True
)
print(cohort_pipe.data[['user_id', 'acquisition_date', 'acquisition_month']].head())

parameters.cohort_column: Name of the column to store cohort information (default: 'cohort')
parameters.combine_source: Whether to combine time period with acquisition source (default: True)
parameters.format_cohorts: Whether to format cohorts as readable strings (default: True)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime

monthly_retention.description: Calculate 6-month retention rates for monthly cohorts
monthly_retention.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_time_cohorts, calculate_retention

# Step 1: Create sample data with user activities
sample_data = pd.DataFrame({
    'user_id': range(1, 201),
    'signup_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=200, freq='D'),
    'activity_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=200, freq='D')
})

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline and form cohorts
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    time_period='M',
    format_cohorts=True
)

# Step 3: Calculate retention
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    date_column='activity_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    time_period='M',
    max_periods=6,
    retention_type='classic'
)

# Step 4: View results
retention_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(retention_df.head())

# Step 5: Get summary
summary = cohort_pipe.get_summary()
print(f"Analysis type: {summary['analysis_type']}")
print(f"Total cohorts: {summary['total_cohorts']}")

rolling_retention.description: Calculate rolling retention (users who return in this period or later)
rolling_retention.code:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    time_period='M',
    format_cohorts=True
)

cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    date_column='activity_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    time_period='M',
    max_periods=6,
    retention_type='rolling'
)

retention_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(retention_df.head())

weekly_retention.description: Calculate weekly retention for detailed analysis
weekly_retention.code:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_week',
    time_period='W',
    format_cohorts=True
)

cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='signup_week',
    date_column='activity_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    time_period='W',
    max_periods=8,
    retention_type='classic'
)

retention_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(retention_df.head())

parameters.max_periods: Maximum number of periods to calculate retention for (default: 12)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime

description: Calculate conversion funnel metrics for cohorts

subscription_funnel.description: Track conversion from trial to paid subscription by cohort
subscription_funnel.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_behavioral_cohorts, calculate_conversion

# Step 1: Create sample data with funnel events
funnel_events = []
for user_id in range(1, 201):
    cohort = 'Q1_2023' if user_id <= 100 else 'Q2_2023'
    # Simulate funnel progression
    events = ['trial_started', 'feature_used', 'paywall_viewed', 'subscription_purchased']
    for i, event in enumerate(events):
        if user_id % (4-i+1) == 0:  # Some users drop off at each step
            funnel_events.append({
                'user_id': user_id,
                'cohort': cohort,
                'event_type': event,
                'event_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=1, freq='D')[0] + pd.Timedelta(days=i)
            })

sample_data = pd.DataFrame(funnel_events)

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline and form cohorts
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='cohort',
    cohort_column='cohort_group',
    custom_cohorts={'Q1_2023': lambda df: df['cohort'] == 'Q1_2023',
                   'Q2_2023': lambda df: df['cohort'] == 'Q2_2023'}
)

# Step 3: Calculate conversion funnel
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='cohort_group',
    event_column='event_type',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['trial_started', 'feature_used', 'paywall_viewed', 'subscription_purchased'],
    step_names=['Trial', 'Feature Usage', 'Paywall', 'Purchase'],
    include_rates=True,
    cumulative=True
)

# Step 4: View results
conversion_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(conversion_df)

# Step 5: Get summary
summary = cohort_pipe.get_summary()
print(f"Analysis type: {summary['analysis_type']}")

ecommerce_funnel.description: Track e-commerce conversion funnel by acquisition source
ecommerce_funnel.code:
ecommerce_events = []
for user_id in range(1, 301):
    source = ['organic', 'paid', 'referral'][user_id % 3]
    cohort = f'{source}_Q1_2023'
    # Simulate e-commerce funnel
    events = ['email_signup', 'site_visit', 'product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout', 'purchase']
    for i, event in enumerate(events):
        if user_id % (6-i+1) == 0:  # Some users drop off at each step
            ecommerce_events.append({
                'user_id': user_id,
                'cohort': cohort,
                'event_type': event,
                'event_date': pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=1, freq='D')[0] + pd.Timedelta(days=i)
            })

sample_data = pd.DataFrame(ecommerce_events)

cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='cohort',
    cohort_column='acquisition_cohort',
    custom_cohorts={
        'organic_Q1_2023': lambda df: df['cohort'] == 'organic_Q1_2023',
        'paid_Q1_2023': lambda df: df['cohort'] == 'paid_Q1_2023',
        'referral_Q1_2023': lambda df: df['cohort'] == 'referral_Q1_2023'
    }
)

cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='acquisition_cohort',
    event_column='event_type',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['email_signup', 'site_visit', 'product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout', 'purchase'],
    include_rates=True,
    cumulative=False
)

conversion_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(conversion_df)

parameters.funnel_steps: List of event names representing steps in the funnel, in order
parameters.step_names: Friendly names for the funnel steps (optional)
parameters.include_rates: Whether to include conversion rates between steps (default: True)
parameters.cumulative: Whether to show cumulative conversion from first step (default: True)

description: Calculate lifetime value metrics for cohorts

monthly_ltv.description: Calculate 12-month cumulative lifetime value by acquisition month
monthly_ltv.code:
import pandas as pd
from insightsagents.app.tools.mltools.cohortanalysistools import CohortPipe, form_time_cohorts, calculate_lifetime_value

# Step 1: Create sample data with revenue transactions
ltv_data = []
for user_id in range(1, 201):
    signup_date = pd.date_range('2023-01-01', periods=1, freq='D')[0] + pd.Timedelta(days=user_id % 30)
    # Simulate monthly revenue for 12 months
    for month in range(12):
        transaction_date = signup_date + pd.Timedelta(days=month * 30)
        revenue = 50 + (user_id % 10) * 10 + (month * 5)  # Varying revenue
        ltv_data.append({
            'user_id': user_id,
            'signup_date': signup_date,
            'transaction_date': transaction_date,
            'revenue': revenue
        })

sample_data = pd.DataFrame(ltv_data)

# Step 2: Initialize pipeline and form cohorts
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    time_period='M',
    format_cohorts=True
)

# Step 3: Calculate lifetime value
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    date_column='transaction_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    value_column='revenue',
    time_period='M',
    max_periods=12,
    cumulative=True
)

# Step 4: View results
ltv_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(ltv_df.head())

# Step 5: Get summary
summary = cohort_pipe.get_summary()
print(f"Analysis type: {summary['analysis_type']}")

weekly_ltv.description: Calculate weekly average order value trends
weekly_ltv.code:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(

cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(

    time_period='W',

)

ltv_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(ltv_df.head())

non_cumulative_ltv.description: Calculate non-cumulative LTV to see period-by-period value
non_cumulative_ltv.code:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(sample_data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    time_period='M',
    format_cohorts=True
)

cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='signup_month',
    date_column='transaction_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    value_column='revenue',
    time_period='M',
    max_periods=12,
    cumulative=False
)

ltv_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(ltv_df.head())

parameters.max_periods: Maximum number of periods to calculate LTV for (default: 12)
parameters.cumulative: Whether to show cumulative LTV over time (default: True)
parameters.datetime_format: Format string for parsing dates if not already datetime

description: Convert cohort analysis results to DataFrame
prerequisites: Any cohort analysis function (calculate_retention, calculate_conversion, calculate_lifetime_value)

basic_export.description: Export retention analysis results to DataFrame
basic_export.code:
# After running calculate_retention
retention_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()
print(retention_df.head())
print(f"Retention data shape: {retention_df.shape}")

with_metadata.code:
# Export with metadata
retention_df_with_metadata = cohort_pipe.to_df(include_metadata=True)
print(retention_df_with_metadata.columns)
print(retention_df_with_metadata.head())

description: Merge cohort analysis results into base dataframe

merge_retention.description: Merge retention results back to original data
merge_retention.code:
# After running calculate_retention
original_data = sample_data.copy()
enriched_data = cohort_pipe.merge_to_df(original_data)
print(enriched_data.columns)
print(enriched_data.head())

merge_with_metadata.description: Merge with metadata for comprehensive analysis
merge_with_metadata.code:
enriched_data = cohort_pipe.merge_to_df(
    original_data, 
    include_metadata=True
)
print(enriched_data.columns)
print(enriched_data[['user_id', 'signup_date', 'pipeline_type', 'pipeline_has_results']].head())

description: Get summary of cohort analysis results

basic_summary.description: Get basic summary of analysis results
basic_summary.code:
# After running any cohort analysis
summary = cohort_pipe.get_summary()
print(f"Analysis name: {summary['analysis_name']}")
print(f"Analysis type: {summary['analysis_type']}")
print(f"Total analyses: {summary['total_analyses']}")
print(f"Available analyses: {summary['available_analyses']}")
print(f"Total cohorts: {summary['total_cohorts']}")
